levels.name: HSK 1
levels.description: Beginner level - Basic vocabulary and simple sentences

stories.title: 会说话的书
stories.description: A student discovers a magical book that can help with learning

stories.title: 诗人的茶
stories.description: The Poet's Tea

stories.title: 我的影子朋友
stories.description: My Shadow Friend

stories.title: 读书的狗
stories.description: The Reading Dog

stories.title: 新邻居
stories.description: New Neighbors

levels.name: HSK 2
levels.description: Elementary level - Everyday conversations and situations

stories.title: 聪明的闹钟
stories.description: The Smart Alarm

stories.title: 爷爷的地图
stories.description: Grandfather's Map

stories.title: 魔法厨房
stories.description: The Magic Kitchen

stories.title: 上错了课
stories.description: Wrong Class

stories.title: 午饭小偷
stories.description: Lunch Thief

levels.name: HSK 3
levels.description: Intermediate level - Longer narratives and complex topics

stories.title: 标签眼镜
stories.description: Special glasses show floating labels above objects revealing what they're thinking. A person discovers that everything has a story and learns to appreciate ordinary objects more.

stories.title: 进城 - 1985
stories.description: A young person's first time arriving in Reform-era Beijing, experiencing the overwhelming transition from countryside to city life in 1985.

stories.title: 诚实的自行车
stories.description: A magical bicycle that only moves when its rider tells it true stories. The protagonist learns the value of honesty through their unique relationship with the bike.

stories.title: 错误的手机
stories.description: Two people with the same name accidentally swap identical phones, leading to hilarious confusion as they receive each other's calls and messages.

stories.title: 阳台花园
stories.description: An elderly neighbor teaches a stressed young person about gardening and life lessons through the seasons of planting and growth on a balcony garden.

levels.name: HSK 4
levels.description: Upper intermediate level - Abstract themes and rich vocabulary

stories.title: 明天的茶
stories.description: A magical teapot that reveals alternate life paths with each sip, teaching the value of choices made.

stories.title: 书法家的选择
stories.description: A Song Dynasty calligrapher must choose between wealth and artistic integrity.

stories.title: 记忆茶馆
stories.description: A mysterious teahouse where different teas transform memories, teaching the value of preserving them unchanged.

stories.title: 奶奶玩网络
stories.description: A 70-year-old grandmother learns to use a smartphone with hilarious results and unexpected viral success.

stories.title: 公园观察者
stories.description: A writer discovers profound meaning in observing ordinary daily life at the local park.
